"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Tcp_Client.dir/objects.a
C:\MinGW\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\Tcp_Client.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Tcp_Client.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\MinGW\bin\g++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Tcp_Client.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o bin\Tcp_Client.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libTcp_Client.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Tcp_Client.dir\linkLibs.rsp
